§6Viaduct§f

§aTransport players instantly through a network of viaduct tubes at §e10 blocks per second§f!§f

§bViaducts§f carry players between configured locations. Each opened side in the network acts as both entrance and destination. Destinations can be named and given custom icons.

§6Crafting§f:
§b• Viaduct (Untreated)§f — §e3× Bronze Ingot§f + §e6× Hardened Glass§f → §e4× Viaduct (Untreated)§f.
§b• Viaduct§f — §e1× Viaduct (Untreated)§f + §e100 mB Zephyrean Aerotheum§f → §e1× Viaduct§f (§e800 RF§f, Fluid Transposer).

§6Usage§f:
§9Right-click§f an entrance to choose a destination. §9Sneak§f while traveling to exit early.

§6Customization§f:
Destinations can be named and given custom icons. This lets you build themed networks (e.g., "Vault", "Workshop", "Mine") that are easy to navigate at a glance.

§eTip§f: Use a §bLong Range Linking Viaduct§f at each end of long runs to extend range and connect distant base sections.
